title: Ad Infinitum
description: A modded experience carefully designed to give the player unlimited opportunities in any realm, including magic, tech, adventure, and more.
body:
Ad Infinitum (Translation: To Infinity) is a kitchen sink modpack that seeks to provide an enjoyable, heavily modded experience for any player. Revolving around quests, it merely aims players to delve into whatever they'd like, whether it harnessing the power of the void through the dark arts ([Purpeile](https://modrinth.com/mod/purpeille)), exploring the high skies ([Paradise Lost](https://modrinth.com/mod/paradise-lost)), or even beyond ([Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)). 

## Why Ad Infinitum?

 - This modpack is carefully designed to run on lower-end systems, especially by having the performance optimizations provided by [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop). In fact, the entire modpack has only 78 mods!
 - This modpack supports Fabric 1.19.2. Long are the days of reverting back to a six year old Minecraft version with a modloader that hasn't been updated in over a year (Forge 1.12.2).

For the time being, I'm focusing on updating to 1.20.1 to include the [Heracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/heracles) tree-style questing mod and starting work on the actual questing aspect of this modpack.
